# Bows
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Bows&prop=wikitext

The bow is the main weapon of the archer and the huntress and it's mostly focused on high dps at medium range.
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ReapersBow.png
| link = Reaper's Bow
| text = Reaper's Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Handcannon.png
| link = Handcannon
| text = Handcannon
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ThousandShot.png
| link = Thousand Shot
| text = Thousand Shot
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = BowOfTheVoid.png
| link = Bow of the Void
| text = Bow of the Void
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = UndeadsGrossBow.png
| link = Undead's Gross Bow
| text = Undead's Gross Bow
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = LeafBow.png
| link = Leaf Bow
| text = Leaf Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = DoomBow.png
| link = Doom Bow
| text = Doom Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = CoralBow.png
| link = Coral Bow
| text = Coral Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = PreciselyCalibratedStringstick.png
| link = Precisely Calibrated Stringstick
| text = Precisely Calibrated Stringstick
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Robobow.png
| link = Robobow
| text = Robobow
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BowOfTheMorningStar.png
| link = Bow of the Morning Star
| text = Bow of the Morning Star
}}
|-
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ArcticBow.png
| link = Arctic Bow
| text = Arctic Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = HeavyBowOfTheAsgardGuardian.png
| link = Heavy Bow of the Asgard Guardian
| text = Heavy Bow of the Asgard Guardian
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = MetalBloodBow.png
| link = Metal Blood Bow
| text = Metal Blood Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BowOfTheLightningGod.png
| link = Bow of the Lightning God
| text = Bow of the Lightning God
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = IceShatter.png
| link = Ice Shatter
| text = Ice Shatter
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = NectarCrossfire.png
| link = Nectar Crossfire
| text = Nectar Crossfire
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WoodenElegance.png
| link = Wooden Elegance
| text = Wooden Elegance
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Unique</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = CupidsBow.png
| link = Cupid's Bow
| text = Cupid's Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BowOfEternalFrost.png
| link = Bow of Eternal Frost
| text = Bow of Eternal Frost
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BowOfNightmares.png
| link = Bow of Nightmares
| text = Bow of Nightmares
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = CloverBow.png
| link = Clover Bow
| text = Clover Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = HallowsEnd.png
| link = Hallow's End
| text = Hallow's End
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GalaxyLongbow.png
| link = Galaxy Longbow
| text = Galaxy Longbow
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BowOfInnocentBlood.png
| link = Bow of Innocent Blood
| text = Bow of Innocent Blood
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BowOfCovertHavens.png
| link = Bow of Covert Havens
| text = Bow of Covert Havens
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BowOfMysticalEnergy.png
| link = Bow of Mystical Energy
| text = Bow of Mystical Energy
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Shortbow.png
| link = Shortbow
| text = Shortbow
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ReinforcedBow.png
| link = Reinforced Bow
| text = Reinforced Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Crossbow.png
| link = Crossbow
| text = Crossbow
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = GreywoodBow.png
| link = Greywood Bow
| text = Greywood Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = IronwoodBow.png
| link = Ironwood Bow
| text = Ironwood Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = FireBow.png
| link = Fire Bow
| text = Fire Bow
}}
|-
| {{ImageBlack
| file = DoubleBow.png
| link = Double Bow
| text = Double Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HeavyCrossbow.png
| link = Heavy Crossbow
| text = Heavy Crossbow
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = GoldenBow.png
| link = Golden Bow
| text = Golden Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = VerdantBow.png
| link = Verdant Bow
| text = Verdant Bow
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BowOfFeyMagic.png
| link = Bow of Fey Magic
| text = Bow of Fey Magic
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BowOfDeepEnchantment.png
| link = Bow of Deep Enchantment
| text = Bow of Deep Enchantment
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
